note: perf v0.3 — tier-2 (realistic). batch=4, seq=512 = 2048 tokens. ~128x tier-1 token count.
interpretation: At realistic size, even the broken-compile baseline gets ~1.2x speedup (more compute per graph segment amortizes the fixed graph-break overhead). Strategy ranking should compare against this number, not tier-1's 0.93x baseline.
